Findings.Title: VM does not have Azure Disk Encryption enabled
Findings.Detail: Virtual machine vm-web-01 does not have Azure Disk Encryption (ADE) enabled. OS and data disks should be encrypted at rest using platform-managed or customer-managed keys.
Findings.Remediation: Enable Azure Disk Encryption on the VM through the Azure Portal or by running Set-AzVMDiskEncryptionExtension.

RemediationSnippets.code: az vm encryption enable --name vm-web-01 --resource-group rg-prod-eastus

Findings.Title: Storage account is not using zone-redundant storage
Findings.Detail: Storage account stproddata01 is configured with LRS replication. Zone-redundant storage (ZRS) is recommended for high availability workloads.
Findings.Remediation: Migrate the storage account to ZRS or GZRS replication by creating a support request or using the Azure Portal migration option.

Findings.Title: Key Vault has diagnostic settings configured
Findings.Detail: Key Vault kv-prod-01 has diagnostic settings configured with audit and metric logs sent to a Log Analytics workspace.
